title: Github Forensics 4
description: A client has requested assistance after a network compromise caused a full outage. Preliminary forensic analysis shows the attack originated from a single user account, indicating a potential insider threat. Investigate the incident to identify the insider and determine the actions taken during the attack. You have been given the compromised user's github profile - https://github.com/EMarseille99. One of the compromised account's followers is based in Kanpur. Can you find their LinkedIn profile?
hints: Have a look at the compromised account's followers
